items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次确认因美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问。本次相对此前暂停公告无新增技术细节、未公布恢复时间、未涉及降级方案。对正在使用这两个模型的服务必须立即停用或迁移。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：将所有调用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的 API 客户端切换至仍可用的 Claude 模型（如 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 系列），并在网关层加 model 名称黑名单以防误调用，同时关注 Anthropic 后续解禁或替代模型公告。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化，对调用 Claude 的工程系统零影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，仅为人才与公益项目，无需任何代码、依赖或配置变更。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展至约 150 家新组织，覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业公益/安全研究项目扩展，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整。对开发者公共 API 使用无影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，为项目规模扩展公告，不涉及 API/SDK/参数变更，无需任何代码或配置改动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，相对 Opus 4.5 在编码、Agent 任务与专业工作场景上做了能力升级，并显著改进专业领域表现。摘要被噪音文本污染，具体新参数（context window、Tool Use、max_tokens）与定价未在原文给出，需查 changelog 确认。已有使用 Opus 4.5 的系统应计划平滑迁移。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：将 Claude 调用中的 model 字段由 claude-opus-4-5 改为 claude-opus-4-8 并跑回归评测；关注 Anthropic changelog 中关于 context window、Tool Use 与 max_tokens 的具体变化，以及 Opus 4.5 的 deprecation 时间线。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 结果，属于公司层面的透明度与治理报告，未涉及具体模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变更。对开发者调用接口的兼容性、限流、区域可用性均无影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，仅为透明度报告，不涉及 API/SDK/参数变更，无需任何代码或配置改动。
